Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is granted, with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
